name: Roasted Red Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 jars (12 oz each) roasted red peppers, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic. Cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. If the mixture is too dry, add water, 2 tablespoons at a time.
4. Stir in roasted red peppers and thyme. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Add chicken broth and white wine. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 more minutes.
6. Transfer sauce to a food processor or blender. Stir in half-and-half and salt; process until pureed.
7. Meanwhile, cook the pasta according to package directions. Drain and transfer to a large serving bowl.
8. Toss with sauce. Stir in basil. Serve immediately.
